item.title: A message from Ms. Burnie, Mr. Warner, Mr. Brookes:
item.description: The final tryout for the grade 7 - 8 girls basketball team is tonight from 2:25 pm to 4:00 pm. If you missed Monday's tryout you must attend tonight to be eligible for the team.

item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There will be a mandatory Drama Club Meeting tomorrow at 10:35 in Rm.209.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron.
item.description: There will be a unity club meeting today at lunch in room 126. All elevate and empower presenters and supporters must attend. Could all Europe trip students please return their sold 50/50 tickets stubs and money INCLUDING any UNSOLD tickets to Mme Perron at lunch today.

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: A reminder that the ski/snowboard equipment for tomorrow's outing will be stored in room 125 Mme Perron's classroom

item.title: A message from: Ms. Brennan.
item.description: The Dungeons & Dragons Club is meeting again this Friday and there’s a seat at the table for everyone! Whether you’re looking for a space to run your own campaign, hoping to join an existing adventure, or just want to meet fellow fantasy fans and storytellers, come roll some dice and connect with like-minded adventurers. See you at lunch in room 201!

item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan:
item.description: Attention Garden Club members! Please check our Teams page for important updates. Students who are interested in learning more about garden club, stop by and see Ms. Brennan in room 201 at lunch.
